name: Tee-Drill Lagputting
description: Per Round, you have three Balls and need to putt them within the front of the hole or 10% Past (1 foot for a 10 Foot Putt). Per Ball: If you’re in the zone you get one point and if you hole it you get two points. Get as many points as possible in 10 Rounds.

name: Up & Down Drawback
description: You play nine holes. Per hole, you drop  a ball from off the green and chip it at a pin. If your ball is on the green, you pull it back one putter length and putt from there until it's in the hole.

name: Up & Down Drawback
